username.description: Name of the user for whom the token has to be generated

access-token.description: Access token in JWT format with a short expiry

token-type.description: Type of the token that is generated(Bearer)

refresh-token.description: Refresh token in JWT format to fetch a new access token.

message.description: Message from EFA that needs any user action

example.message: Certificates will expire soon, please renew

username.description: Name of the user for whom the token has to be generated

access-token.description: Access token in JWT format with a short expiry

token-type.description: Type of the token that is generated(Bearer)

message.description: Message from EFA that needs any user action

example.message: Certificates will expire soon, please renew

expiry.description: Number of seconds until extended token must expire

name.description: Name for the client(tenant name for Openstack clients)

clientType.description: Type of the client(openstack for Openstack clients)

roles.description: Count of users based on their roles(System Admin/Network Operator)

host.description: Specify the hostname or IPv4/IPv6 address

port.description: Specify the port at which the OpenLDAP server is listening for connections

tls.description: Enable to use LDAP over SSL/TLS

insecure-tls.description: Enable to use LDAP without cert verification

timeout.description: Duration in number of seconds before considering the server unreachable(defaults to 5 sec)

bind-user-name.description: Distinguished Name (DN) of the user that should be used to bind, search and retrieve LDAP entries

user-search-base.description: Enter the Distinguished Name of the node in your directory tree from which to start searching for user objects.

user-object-class.description: Name of the object class used for user objects(defaults to inetOrgPerson)

user-login-attribute.description: The attribute whose value matches the username part of credentials entered by your users when logging in(defualts to uid)

user-role-attribute.description: The attribute to read the role of user from

user-role-attribute-key.description: The attribute to read the role value from role attribute

user-member-attribute.description: The attribute to read the member of the group the user is part of

group-search-base.description: Enter the Distinguished Name of the node in your directory tree from which to start searching for group objects.

group-object-class.description: Name of the object class used for group objects(defaults to groupOfNames)

group-attribute.description: Attribute to define search filter on group(defaults to cn)

group-member-user-attribute.description: The name of the user attribute whose format matches the group members(defualts to entrydn)

group-member-mapping-attribute.description: The name of the group attribute containing the members of a group(defaults to member)

host.description: Specify the hostname or IPv4/IPv6 address

port.description: Specify the port at which the OpenLDAP server is listening for connections

tls.description: Enable to use LDAP over SSL/TLS

insecure-tls.description: Enable to use LDAP without cert verification

timeout.description: Duration in number of seconds before considering the server unreachable(defaults to 5 sec)

bind-user-name.description: Distinguished Name (DN) of the user that should be used to bind, search and retrieve LDAP entries

user-search-base.description: Enter the Distinguished Name of the node in your directory tree from which to start searching for user objects.

user-object-class.description: Name of the object class used for user objects(defaults to inetOrgPerson)

user-login-attribute.description: The attribute whose value matches the username part of credentials entered by your users when logging in(defualts to uid)

user-role-attribute.description: The attribute to read the role of user from

user-role-attribute-key.description: The attribute to read the role value from role attribute

user-member-attribute.description: The attribute to read the member of the group the user is part of

group-search-base.description: Enter the Distinguished Name of the node in your directory tree from which to start searching for group objects.

group-object-class.description: Name of the object class used for group objects(defaults to groupOfNames)

group-attribute.description: Attribute to define search filter on group(defaults to cn)

group-member-user-attribute.description: The name of the user attribute whose format matches the group members(defualts to entrydn)

group-member-mapping-attribute.description: The name of the group attribute containing the members of a group(defaults to member)

name.description: Name for the user or group for whom role is to assigned

role.description: Name of the role to be assigned

type.description: Type of the assignment (user or group)

auth_type.description: Authorization framework type (local, host, tacacs, or ldap)

type.description: Type of the assignment (user or group)

auth_type.description: Authorization framework type (local, host, tacacs, or ldap)

code.description:
1000 - Unknown Error.
1001 - Validation Error.
 25001 - Token generation Error.
25002 - API Key generation Error.
25003 - Token expired Error.
25004 - No token Error.
25005 - Invalid token Error.
25006 - Certificate loading Error.
25007 - Invalid client type Error.
25008 - Client registration Error.
25009 - Invalid client Error.
